FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Power Surplus
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your settlements are generating more power than they can consume. The excess energy crackles through the grid, waiting to be put to use. What do you do with the extra power?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Sell the excess power to neighboring factions. Profit is profit.
Power the research labs around the clock. Knowledge is the real currency.
Route the power into manufacturing. More energy means more output.
Use the surplus to power expansion projects. Grow the settlements.
Extend the grid to support new frontier settlements.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Power Exported
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Neighboring factions eagerly purchase your excess power. Silver flows in as your settlements become regional energy suppliers. The revenue stream lasts as long as the surplus holds out.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Research Expansion
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The surplus power is channeled into research facilities, enabling round-the-clock experimentation and data processing. New equipment is installed, and the expanded capacity permanently accelerates the pace of discovery.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Manufacturing Electrified
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Excess power is routed directly into the manufacturing sector. Electric tools replace manual ones, assembly lines accelerate, and output increases across the board. The infrastructure improvements are permanent — your factories will never go back to the old ways.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Growth Subsidized
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The surplus power fuels an ambitious expansion program. New housing is built, public amenities are electrified, and the settlements buzz with opportunity. Workers flock to the growing communities, and morale rises as quality of life improves. The growth spurt lasts as long as the power surplus holds.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Frontier Grid
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The surplus power is routed to frontier infrastructure. Power lines stretch toward unclaimed territory, lighting construction sites and powering prefabricated shelters. The electrified frontier makes founding new settlements cheaper and attracts workers eager to join a well-powered community.
